items: Has an excellent understanding of HTML, CSS, and Javascript/Typescript.
Highly proficient in the PHP web programming language.
Familiar with SQL syntax and can work with MySQL, SQLite, and MS SQL.
Adept in working with PHP frameworks, especially Symfony and Laravel.
Develops and maintains websites using WordPress.
Familiar with responsive website design and applies current best practices.
Well-versed in version control systems such as Git and Subversion.
Knows front-end Javascript frameworks such as Vue, Angular, and React.
Has working experience using static site builders such as Astro, Hugo, and Nuxt.
Adapts to front-end CSS frameworks; regularly uses Tailwind, Bootstrap, and Bulma.
Knows Markdown and able to learn different formatting syntaxes.
Knows his way with the Unix terminal and can build and maintain web servers.
Can learn any front-end or back-end framework in a short time frame.
Has led and managed development teams and is familiar with Agile methodology.
Uses AI agents such as Claude to speed up development while ensuring generated code is up to standards and compliance.
Proficient in Python, Java, C#, C++, C, and Ruby programming languages.
Knowledgeable in procedural, functional, and SOLID object-oriented programming.
Develops native Android applications using Koltin and Android Studio.
Understands and has experience coding in assembly language.
Able to learn new programming languages in a reasonable amount of time.
Can write Bash (Unix), batch (MS-DOS), and PowerShell scripts to automate tasks.
Writes scripts for ArcGIS to automate tasks including spatial analysis and layouting.
Able to write custom Scripts and Add-ons using Javascript for Google Sheets used in various applications.
Develops code modifications (mods) for Unreal Engine and Unity games.
Adept in using Microsoft Office software specifically Word, Excel, and PowerPoint; and their Google or LibreOffice counterparts.
Proficient in using image editing including Adobe Photoshop, GIMP, and Krita.
Knows how to edit videos and has experience using Non-Linear Editors such as Adobe Premier and Da Vinci Resolve.
Has certification in Geographic Information Systems (GIS) fundamentals and can operate GIS software, namely ArcGIS.
Uses 3D Modelling Software, specifically Blender, to create and edit meshes, apply materials or textures, do basic skeleton rigging, and basic texture editing.
Can build desktop computers using custom manufacturer parts.
Can touch-type; encodes with excellent speed and accuracy.
Has outstanding grasp of both English and Filipino Languages.
Possesses project and personnel management experience and can write project proposals, policies, Gantt charts, and budgets.
Experienced in using project management tools such as Jira and Trello.
Has authored, co-authored, proofread, and edited publications and researches.
Has organized, presented in, and emceed at events, conferences, and seminars.
Blogs as a hobby; owns and writes a personal food blog.
